title: Firefly Bush Backport
body:
![Banner artwork](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15424937d9f07ebd41de48fdb940bbd11132399e.jpeg)

<details>
<summary>Disclaimer</summary>
All in-game textures/sounds are from 1.21.5 made by Mojang. I did not make them.
</details>

This mod simply brings the firefly bush from 1.21.5 to older versions. It works as similarly to the original as possible, emitting firefly particles around itself at night or in a dark environment and playing ambient sounds at night. It can be found in swamp biomes or near any body of water.

This mod comes with a client-side config file. The config allows for tweaking the behaviour and visual aspects of the fireflies.

# FAQ

<details>
<summary>Can I use this in my modpack?</summary>
Yes, go for it! Just make sure to use the appropriate source for your modpack (Modrinth/CurseForge).
</details>

<details>
<summary>Will this be ported to x.x.x version?</summary>
Feel free to open up a version port request on my issue tracker and I will see what I can do.
</details>
